laws.title: Public Law 4-34 | An Act to Prevent the Proliferation of Magistrates and Ensure Basic Judicial Competence
laws.status_basis: Listed in the source manifest under Repealed Laws. The source creates a permanent general bar-certification rule for magistrate and judicial appointments, but no self-repeal or sunset appears internally; repeal is external.

provisions.text_summary: No person may be appointed as a magistrate without federal-court certification; appointing officer is liable to impeachment.
provisions.exact_change: Do not insert operative text because the act is repealed; retain history only.
provisions.evidence: No person shall be appointed as a Magistrate
provisions.notes: The subject belongs in title 28, not title 50.

provisions.text_summary: Adds the same certification requirement for judges and justices.
provisions.exact_change: Do not insert operative text because the act is repealed; retain history only.
provisions.evidence: No person shall be appointed as a Judge or Justice

provisions.text_summary: Gives already-appointed officials ten days to comply or face impeachment or removal.

recommended_actions: Remove the full-text dump and Trello link from the current note.
Retain only a concise historical note at title 28, not title 50.

laws.title: Public Law 4-36 | Defense Heraldic Services Act
laws.status_basis: Listed under 1st - 10th U.S. Congress, not repealed. The rendered HTML contains the operative text: it repeals 10 U.S.C. 7594 and adds a new heraldic-services section in chapter 48, subchapter II of title 10.

provisions.text_summary: Short title, immediate effective date, conflict clause, and severability.
provisions.exact_change: Keep as enactment context only.
provisions.evidence: referred to as the "Defense Heraldic Services Act of 2022"

provisions.text_summary: Repeals section 7594 of chapter 767 of title 10 and reserves the section number.
provisions.exact_change: Repeal 10 U.S.C. 7594 and mark it reserved.
provisions.evidence: by repealing section 7594 in its entirety
provisions.notes: Requires an actual textual repeal-marking, not a note.

provisions.text_summary: Adds a new section for furnishing heraldic services in title 10, chapter 48, subchapter II.
provisions.exact_change: Insert the new heraldic-services section in chapter 48, subchapter II with the source text's subsections on design, advice, and reimbursement.
provisions.evidence: Subchapter II of Chapter 48 of Title 10, United States Code, is amended
provisions.notes: The source labels the inserted section as section 206.

current_implementation.detail: The current branch contains a statutory note in usc10.xml, but it does not perform the required repeal-marking of section 7594 or add the new heraldic-services section.

recommended_actions: Perform the actual repeal-marking of 10 U.S.C. 7594 and reserve the section.
Insert the new heraldic-services section into title 10, chapter 48, subchapter II, and remove the Trello link.
